summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Configuración de Resoluciones feature. All 27 backend tests passed (18 plantillas + 9 configuration). Frontend UI testing verified all components working correctly: both tabs (Plantillas de Texto, Numeración 2026), M1 template editing, firmante inputs, save functionality, and configuration updates.
seed_data_creation: M1 template text updated during testing, numeración set to 50
context_for_next_testing_agent: ConfiguracionResoluciones feature fully tested. All endpoints working: GET/PUT /api/resoluciones/configuracion (numeración), GET/PUT /api/resoluciones/plantillas (templates list), GET/PUT /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1 (specific template), POST /api/resoluciones/generar-preview (PDF preview), GET /api/resoluciones/siguiente-numero/{municipio}. Page accessible at /dashboard/configuracion-resoluciones. Access restricted to administradores only for configuration, coordinadores can view plantillas and generate previews.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas: PASS - Returns array of templates with M1
backend_endpoints.GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1: PASS - Returns M1 template with texto, firmante_nombre, firmante_cargo
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1: PASS - Updates template text and firmante info
backend_endpoints.POST /api/resoluciones/generar-preview?t: PASS - Generates valid PDF with base64 encoding
backend_endpoints.GET /api/resoluciones/siguiente-numero/{: PASS - Returns next resolution number for Ábrego (54003), Ocaña (54498), Convención (54206)

access_control.admin_plantillas_access: PASS - Full access to all endpoints
access_control.coordinador_plantillas_access: PASS - Can view and generate preview

frontend_ui.guardar_plantilla: PASS - data-testid='btn-guardar-plantilla' saves with toast 'Plantilla guardada correctamente'
frontend_ui.guardar_config: PASS - data-testid='btn-guardar-config' saves with toast 'Configuración guardada correctamente'
frontend_ui.next_number_display: PASS - Shows 'La próxima resolución automática será: RES-XXXX-51'
